privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding.inp project is a real multi-story commercial building energy model from eQUEST training materials (3,258 lines, 94,825 bytes). Zone T.C35 (Core Spc) exists with coordinates X=15, Y=15. However, the task description contains errors: (1) the example glass type 'Gt 1 (Dbl Clr Air)' does not appear in eQUEST documentation or the project file; actual glass types in the model are 'Window Type #1 GT' and 'Window Type #2 GT' referencing code 2004 (double clear); (2) T.C35 has no roof surface—only a ceiling connecting to plenum T.C40 above, which has the actual roof. The skylight should technically be on T.C40's roof, not T.C35.
